form.formComment: Third race start. First start raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 8 at Gosford Mdn-Sw on November 11 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Just Response carrying 59kg at $10. Returned from break second last of 8 at Hawkesbury Cg&E Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Poisonous carrying 58kg at $18. Hard to make a case for.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Third race start. First start raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 8 at Gosford Mdn-Sw on November 11 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Just Response carrying 59kg at $10. Returned from break second last of 8 at Hawkesbury Cg&E Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Poisonous carrying 58kg at $18. Hard to make a case for.

form.formComment: First starter. Ghibellines gelding from the Chris Waller yard. Trialled on March 27 at Randwick over 1050m and finished fifth. Makes debut at home but happy to watch this time from a difficult draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter. Ghibellines gelding from the Chris Waller yard. Trialled on March 27 at Randwick over 1050m and finished fifth. Makes debut at home but happy to watch this time from a difficult draw.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding (Trapeze Artist - Text'n Hurley) will no doubt benefit from the five trials prior to his debut today. Was second in a Warwick Farm trial over 1200m March 20. Trained here and not to be overlooked from the good gate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old gelding (Trapeze Artist - Text'n Hurley) will no doubt benefit from the five trials prior to his debut today. Was second in a Warwick Farm trial over 1200m March 20. Trained here and not to be overlooked from the good gate.

form.formComment: At the latest run 2nd of 7 at Warwick Farm 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 11 over 1400m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Spice Prawn carrying 57kg at $14. Before that from last on the turn second last of 7 at Canterbury Mdn-Sw on February 20 over 1250m, 4 len behind Farindira with 58.5kg at $7. Deep into the prep and go close despite drawing out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). At the latest run 2nd of 7 at Warwick Farm 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 11 over 1400m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Spice Prawn carrying 57kg at $14. Before that from last on the turn second last of 7 at Canterbury Mdn-Sw on February 20 over 1250m, 4 len behind Farindira with 58.5kg at $7. Deep into the prep and go close despite drawing out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly. Inclined to lay in under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resuming. Finished off last preparation sixth of 10 at Kembla Grange Super Mdn-Sw October 4 over 1400m, 2.25 len behind Equerry with 56.5kg at $7.50. On debut fifth of 8 at Newcastle Super Cg&E M-Sw September 20 over 1250m, 3 len behind Extractor carrying 56.5kg at $21. Tough ask from the wide gate first-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Resuming. On debut fifth of 8 at Newcastle Super Cg&E M-Sw September 20 over 1250m, 3 len behind Extractor carrying 56.5kg at $21. Tough ask from the wide gate first-up.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. First starter by Wootton Bassett gelding from the Chris Waller yard. Finished seventh in a Warwick Farm trial over 816m on March 30. Doesn't shape as a strong winning hope today.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. First starter by Wootton Bassett gelding from the Chris Waller yard. Finished seventh in a Warwick Farm trial over 816m on March 30. Doesn't shape as a strong winning hope today.

form.formComment: Was at long odds at debut, eased back early on 5th of 10 at Kembla Grange Super Mdn on March 21 over 1200m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Spanish Artist with 56.5kg at $41. Need to see another run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Was at long odds at debut, eased back early on 5th of 10 at Kembla Grange Super Mdn on March 21 over 1200m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Spanish Artist with 56.5kg at $41. Need to see another run.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resuming after a six months break. Finished off last preparation third of 9 at Warwick Farm Mdn October 15 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind Chicama carrying 55.5kg at $16. On debut fourth of 11 at Newcastle F&M Mdn-Sw September 20 over 1250m, 1.75 len behind Vexxy with 55.5kg at $17. Expecting her to hit the ground running this campaign.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Dual acceptor. Resuming after a six months break. Finished off last preparation third of 9 at Warwick Farm Mdn October 15 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind Chicama carrying 55.5kg at $16. On debut fourth of 11 at Newcastle F&M Mdn-Sw September 20 over 1250m, 1.75 len behind Vexxy with 55.5kg at $17. Expecting her to hit the ground running this campaign.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Three-year-old filly making debut by Churchill out of Tropezina. Was third in a Rosehill barrier trial over 900m on March 10. Following that fourth over 900m in a Rosehill trial on March 24. Profiles well and a bold run is expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Three-year-old filly making debut by Churchill out of Tropezina. Was third in a Rosehill barrier trial over 900m on March 10. Following that fourth over 900m in a Rosehill trial on March 24. Profiles well and a bold run is expected.

form.formComment: Having third race start. When well in the market at debut, sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at this track F&M Mdn-Sw on February 25 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Bubbles Up with 57.5kg at $5. Last start raced on the pace when 3rd of 10 at Hawkesbury 3yo Mdn on March 17 over 1300m, 1.2 len behind Ouragan with 57kg at $4.40. Improver who can measure up this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Having third race start. When well in the market at debut, sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at this track F&M Mdn-Sw on February 25 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Bubbles Up with 57.5kg at $5. Last start raced on the pace when 3rd of 10 at Hawkesbury 3yo Mdn on March 17 over 1300m, 1.2 len behind Ouragan with 57kg at $4.40. Improver who can measure up this time.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 5th of 11 at Caulfield Heath Mdn-Sw on March 18 over 1200m, 3 len behind Ten Warriors with 57kg at $21. Previously second-up 7th of 14 at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw on October 30 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Star Compass carrying 55kg at $5. Fitter now and capable of testing this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Second run back. First-up after five months 5th of 11 at Caulfield Heath Mdn-Sw on March 18 over 1200m, 3 len behind Ten Warriors with 57kg at $21. Previously second-up 7th of 14 at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw on October 30 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Star Compass carrying 55kg at $5. Fitter now and capable of testing this field.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and got its head up.

form.formComment: Jumped at very long odds at debut, came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 8 at Beaumont (Newcastle) F&M Mdn-Sw on March 23 over 1150m, on a slow track; 2.25 len behind Chisato with 57.5kg at $61. Nice debut and keep safe with the claim.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6). Jumped at very long odds at debut, came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 8 at Beaumont (Newcastle) F&M Mdn-Sw on March 23 over 1150m, on a slow track; 2.25 len behind Chisato with 57.5kg at $61. Nice debut and keep safe with the claim.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Missed the start (2L) and then from the widest barrier shifted behind runners.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Second-up. First-up after five months 6th of 8 at Hawkesbury Prov Mdn on March 17 over 1100m, 4.5 len behind Frostisen with 56.5kg at $31. Previously second-up second last of 12 at Hawkesbury Prov Mdn-Sw on October 9 over 1100m, 9 len behind Nesrine with 55kg at $61. Blinkers go on and likely to need another run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Dual acceptor. Second-up. First-up after five months 6th of 8 at Hawkesbury Prov Mdn on March 17 over 1100m, 4.5 len behind Frostisen with 56.5kg at $31. Previously second-up second last of 12 at Hawkesbury Prov Mdn-Sw on October 9 over 1100m, 9 len behind Nesrine with 55kg at $61. Blinkers go on and likely to need another run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, shifted in and made contact with Into Brooklyn.
Near the 900m, inconvenienced by Young Mister Grace.

form.formComment: On debut. Three-year-old filly by Too Darn Hot out of Purple. At the most recent trial was out of the placings over 1200m at Randwick March 27. Watch for any market moves.
